top_signals.title: OpenAI Faces Unknowns Even After Victory Over Elon Musk
top_signals.summary: A judge has dismissed Elon Musk's case against OpenAI, and the company appears intent on moving ahead with its Wall Street debut. Bloomberg's Avril Hong reports on what is at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
